memoryArtifacts.headline: Hemmys, Phillippa  story 1399-1427
memoryArtifacts.description: Philippa Hemmys was born in 1399 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England. She married Sir Hugh Fraunceys in 1420 in her hometown. They had four children during their marriage. She died as a young mother in …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Hamme於1375年出生在英國素福爾可維其哈布盧可時，她的父親Sir Stephen Hemmys15歲，母親Dionisia Dionis40歲。她於大約1420年與Hugh Fraunceys在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在英國英格蘭素福爾可哈斯特享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hamme
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish (Van Hamme): variant of Ham 2, particularly referring to Hamme, a place in East Flanders.
German and English: variant of   Hamm  .

variants.name: Ham
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Young, Ok, Nam, Chul, Eun Hee, Eun Young, Hae Jung, Il Hwa.
English (mainly southwestern) and German: variant of   Hamm  .
Dutch: topographic name from ham ‘land in a river bend’, ‘enclosed meadow’, or a habitational name from any of several country houses and places called De(n) Ham. Compare Van Ham and Vanderham .

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Hamme was born in 1375, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Stephen Hemmys, was 15 and her mother, Dionisia Dionis, was 40. She married Hugh Fraunceys about 1420, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1427, in Hartest, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Hamme est née en 1375, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Stephen Hemmys, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Dionisia Dionis, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Fraunceys environ 1420, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1427, à Hartest, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Hamme 1375 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Stephen Hemmys 15 und ihre Mutter Dionisia Dionis 40. Sie hat um 1420 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Hugh Fraunceys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Hartest, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Hamme è nata il nel 1375 nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Stephen Hemmys, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Dionisia Dionis, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Fraunceys circa 1420, nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1427, nel Hartest, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Hammeが1375年にイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークで生まれた時，父Sir Stephen Hemmysは15歳，母Dionisia Dionisは40歳であった。約1420年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークでHugh Fraunceysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年にイギリスイギリススフォルクハーテストで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Hamme(이)가 1375년 영국 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Stephen Hemmys(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dionisia Dionis(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 Hugh Fraunceys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 하츠트에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Hugh Fraunceys aproximadamente 1420, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1427, em Hartest, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Hamme родилась в 1375 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Stephen Hemmys было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionisia Dionis, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Fraunceys около 1420 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности хартест, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 52 лет.

Se casó con Hugh Fraunceys aproximadamente 1420, en Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
